---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

Include a minimal failing code snippet where possible.

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen. Include a reference value from numpy / scipy / statsmodels / R / a textbook when asserting numerical correctness, along with the tolerance you expected to hold.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or the observed numerical output (with enough precision to see the discrepancy).

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- .NET version: [e.g., .NET 10.0]
- Package version: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- Runtime identifier, if relevant: [e.g., osx-arm64, linux-x64]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, reference vectors, or code snippets.
